title: Brotein Crew feature
html:
Stub. The social/leaderboard layer inside Brotein — users join a max-25-person "crew" via a code, share weekly protein totals, and rank on a leaderboard fed by the protein logs table. First built/debugged late August 2025 (NOT NULL crew_code bug → working leaderboard within 2 days).

Synthesized in

  • 2026-04-27 — brotein as rankett prototype (cited in synthesis)

related.label: Brotein as the prototype Rankett refactored
Brotein Crew — Join Crew flow throws Supabase NOT NULL error
Brotein Crew empty state — duplicate capture
Brotein Crew with weekly leaderboard — Testing#1 + Testing#2
Brotein Find Friend — empty state for Bro_jay
What's the through-line from Brotein to Rankett that I haven't named yet?
